cards.title: Image Pricing
cards.helpText: Amazon Rekognition Image charges you each time you analyze an image using our APIs. Running multiple APIs against a single image counts as processing multiple images.

components.label: info alert
components.content:
Amazon Rekognition uses tiered pricing based on the number of images processed in each API group per month.
Group 1: CompareFaces, IndexFaces, SearchFacebyImage, SearchFaces APIs.
Group 2: DetectFaces, DetectModerationLabels, DetectLabels, DetectText, RecognizeCelebrities, DetectProtectiveEquipment APIs.
Other than the APIs listed above, Amazon Rekognition Image also supports Image Properties and face metadata storage which are priced seperately Group 1 and Group 2.
Please see Amazon Rekognition pricing page for tier price details.
